tasks.name: PRD & Backlog Updates
tasks.description: Update Appendix D with adapter architecture note. Update post-mvp-backlog.md item #12 to reflect that RealOpcuaClient is the functional adapter (not just testability), mark as done by Phase 11.

tasks.name: RealOpcuaClient adapter
tasks.description: Implement OpcuaClient interface wrapping node-opcua: connect, createSession, createSubscription, addMonitoredItem, onDataChange, onClose, transferSubscriptions, browse, resolveNamespaceUri, closeSession, disconnect, isConnected, sessionActive. Include TOFU fingerprint extraction, security policy enum mapping, StatusCode error mapping, DataValue→DataChangeEvent conversion.

tasks.name: Wire into plugin factory
tasks.description: Update INPUT_FACTORIES opcua entry to instantiate RealOpcuaClient via lazy require(). Remove stale TODO/throw from OpcuaInput.start(), replace with safety assertion.

tasks.name: Unit tests for RealOpcuaClient
tasks.description: Test adapter against in-process node-opcua OPCUAServer: connect, session, subscription, monitored items, data changes, browse, namespace resolution, disconnect, error handling, security policy mapping, server certificate fingerprint.

tasks.name: Integration test: full pipeline with in-process OPC-UA server
tasks.description: End-to-end: config → plugin factory → OpcuaInput + RealOpcuaClient → data to accumulator. Test data flow, browse mode output, security auto-negotiation. Uses in-process OPCUAServer.

tasks.name: Smoke test: live connection to Eclipse Milo demo server
tasks.description: Integration test that connects to the real public Eclipse Milo demo server at opc.tcp://milo.digitalpetri.com:62541/milo. Subscribe to Dynamic/RandomInt32, Dynamic/RandomFloat, Dynamic/RandomDouble. Verify data changes arrive within 10s. Verify field values are numeric. Verify source timestamps are present. This is the acceptance test that proves the original smoke test failure is fixed. Mark test with a skip-if-offline guard (test.skipIf or try/catch on connect) so CI doesn't fail when the public server is down.

tasks.name: Cleanup stale TODOs
tasks.description: Remove Phase 7 TODO from opcua.ts, update module header comment, verify all existing OPC-UA tests still pass with factory changes.
